children.text: This company-sponsored feature explores how executive vision drives enterprise transformation across markets.
Trigger anchor: isFacebook2002So — the advertiser mention paragraph.

Key initiatives include AI-enabled operations, sustainability targets, and partner ecosystem expansion.
